zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Davenport於大約1136年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，他的父親Ormus de Davenport51歲，母親Lady Mimmie de Davenport37歲。他於1176年之前與Amabilia de Venables結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1153年在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德被列為forester。他去世於1210年之後在英國英格蘭爾諾維其。

zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Davenport于大约1136年出生在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，他的父亲Ormus de Davenport51岁，母亲Lady Mimmie de Davenport37岁。他于1176年之前与Amabilia de Venables结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1153年在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德被列为forester。他去世于1210年之后在英国英格兰爾諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Davenport was born about 1136, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, his father, Ormus de Davenport, was 51 and his mother, Lady Mimmie de Davenport, was 37. He married Amabilia de Venables before 1176. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1153, at the age of 18, his occupation is listed as forester in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England. He died after 1210, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Davenport est né environ 1136, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ormus de Davenport, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Mimmie de Davenport, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Amabilia de Venables avant 1176. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1153, à l’âge de 18 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est forester à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé après 1210, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Davenport um 1136 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ormus de Davenport 51 und seine Mutter Lady Mimmie de Davenport 37. Er hat vor 1176 Amabilia de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1153, als er 18 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als forester in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1210 in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Davenport è nato il circa 1136 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ormus de Davenport, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mimmie de Davenport, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Amabilia de Venables prima del 1176. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1153, all'età di 18 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come forester nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England. Morì dopo il 1210, nel Northwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Davenportが約1136年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Ormus de Davenportは51歳，母Lady Mimmie de Davenportは37歳であった。1176年以前にAmabilia de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1153年，18歳の時，イギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドでの職業はforesterと記録されている。彼は1210年以後にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Davenport(이)가 대략 1136년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ormus de Davenport(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mimmie de Davenport(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1176년 이전 Amabilia de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1153년, 18세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 forester이었다. 그는 1210년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르스위치에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Davenport nasceu aproximadamente 1136, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ormus de Davenport, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mimmie de Davenport, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilia de Venables antes 1176. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1153, com 18 anos, sua profissão aparece como forester em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 1210, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Davenport родился около 1136 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ormus de Davenport было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mimmie de Davenport, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilia de Venables перед 1176 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1153 году, в возрасте 18 лет,  он работал по профессии forester в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия. Он умер после 1210 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Davenport nació aproximadamente 1136, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ormus de Davenport, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lady Mimmie de Davenport, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Amabilia de Venables antes de 1176. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1153, a la edad de 18 años, su ocupación registrada era forester en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Murió después de 1210, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
